heading: Prerequisites
body:
Before creating a DSN (Data Source Name), you should:

**Windows:**

Windows

- Download and install
  [Visual C++ Redistributable for Visual Studio 2015](https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/download/details.aspx?id=48145)

**Macos:**

macOS

- Download and install the [MongoDB ODBC Driver for BI Connector](https://github.com/mongodb/mongo-bi-connector-odbc-driver/releases/) for your platform.
